title: Ukraine Deploys New Leopard 2A6 Tanks Near Pokrovsk Frontlines
summary: Joseph Dempsey shares satellite imagery revealing Ukrainian forces positioning Leopard 2A6 tanks. Images capture multiple tanks near key battle zones. Deployment bolsters defenses against Russian advances.
contents:
## Ukraine Deploys New Leopard 2A6 Tanks Near Pokrovsk Frontlines

### Overview
Joseph Dempsey shares satellite imagery revealing Ukrainian forces positioning Leopard 2A6 tanks. Images capture multiple tanks near key battle zones. Deployment bolsters defenses against Russian advances.

### Event Details
Joseph Dempsey, IISS researcher, posts satellite imagery on Twitter showing Ukrainian military deploys Leopard 2A6 main battle tanks near Pokrovsk in Donetsk Oblast. Maxar Technologies captures images displaying at least five Leopard 2A6 tanks positioned alongside T-72s and BMPs in fortified positions. Tanks arrive via recent arms transfer from Western allies, including Germany and Poland. Imagery reveals tanks undergo camouflage netting and entrenchment preparations. Dempsey reports tanks join ongoing reinforcements amid intensified Russian assaults on Pokrovsk axis. Russian forces launch drone strikes targeting these assets, but Ukrainians disperse units effectively. Previous imagery from April 23 shows initial arrivals; latest updates confirm operational readiness. Deployment counters Russian T-90M and BMPT Terminator advances. IISS analysis highlights Leopard tanks' superior armor and fire control systems enhancing Ukrainian counteroffensives. Local spotters confirm tank movements during nighttime rail transports. Russian Ministry of Defense claims destruction of two Leopards, but Ukrainian sources deny losses. Imagery demonstrates continued Western support through sustained Leopard deliveries despite attrition. Pokrovsk front remains critical chokepoint for Russian logistics toward Kramatorsk. Dempsey threads multiple images with geolocation pins and equipment breakdowns, underscoring tactical implications for Donbas stalemate.

### Source Context
@JosephDempsey (Joseph Dempsey IISS) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on iiss military equipment satellite imagery weapons deployment arms transfer leopard.
